recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: The Kindred
recommendations.overview: After her father’s suicide, a young mother investigates what led to his death. But when she is haunted by spirits and unearths an unsolved mystery from 30 years ago, she discovers a dark family history that could prove deadly for her child.

recommendations.title: I've Loved You So Long
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending fifteen years in prison.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A horror movie star returns to his famous role after spending years in a mental institution, but the character seems to be committing murders independent of his will.

recommendations.title: Reincarnation
recommendations.overview: A Japanese actress begins having strange visions and experiences after landing a role in a horror film about a real-life murder spree that took place over forty years ago.

recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: Agatha and the Truth of Murder
recommendations.overview: England, December 1926. Although her personal life is in tatters, the famous writer Agatha Christie decides to leave everything behind to help unravel an unsolved murder committed on a train six years ago, unable to imagine the disproportionate conse

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Return to Zombie Island
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Mystery, Horror

recommendations.title: Felidae
recommendations.overview: A domestic house cat named Francis investigates the grisly feline murders taking place in his new neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Ripper Untold
recommendations.overview: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve a series of horrific murders in Victorian London - but one of them harbors a deadly secret.
